# Auto-generated from pyproject.toml for Streamlit Cloud compatibility.
# Streamlit Cloud does not read pyproject.toml — it needs this file.
#
# Torch is pinned to the CPU-only build via the --extra-index-url below so that
# deployments on CPU-only hosts (Render free tier, Streamlit Cloud) do NOT pull
# the multi-GB CUDA/nvidia-* wheels. The CPU wheel is ~190MB vs ~3GB for the
# default CUDA build, which makes the difference between a deploy that fits in
# the free-tier build budget and one that times out / runs out of disk.
--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu
torch==2.12.1+cpu
fastapi>=0.136.1
folium>=0.20.0
geopy>=2.4.1
groq>=0.31.0
gunicorn>=26.0.0
loguru>=0.7.3
pandas>=3.0.3
plotly>=6.7.0
psycopg2-binary>=2.9.12
requests>=2.34.2
sqlalchemy>=2.0.49
streamlit>=1.57.0
streamlit-folium>=0.27.2
numpy>=2.0.0
sentence-transformers>=3.0.0
uvicorn>=0.38.0
